task: pick green can from bottom drawer and place on counter
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A white bowl sits on a gray drawer unit. Below, an open drawer contains a green can. The drawer is metallic with a visible handle. The can is cylindrical and metallic. The bowl is shallow and white. The drawer unit has a flat surface. **STRATEGY -** First, reach into the drawer to grasp the green can. Then, transport the can to the counter surface. Finally, place the can on the counter. Failure modes include not grasping the can, dropping it during transport, or misplacing it. **AFFORDANCE REASONING -** Step 1: Reach into the drawer to grasp the can. The can is inside the drawer, so the affordance is the can's body. Step 2: Grasp the can. The can is cylindrical, so grasping its body is appropriate. Step 3: Transport the can to the counter. The counter is the destination, so the affordance is the empty space on the counter. Step 4: Place the can on the counter. The affordance is the empty space on the counter.

Goal: on(green_can, counter); stable(green_can)
Scene: green_can, bowl, drawer_unit, counter
Step 1: reach(drawer)
  affordance_region: the open front of the drawer
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, drawer, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, drawer) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(green_can)
  affordance_region: the body of the green can
  contact: holding(green_can) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(green_can)
Step 3: transport(green_can -> counter)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the counter
  spatial: above(green_can, counter, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(green_can)
  done_when: above(green_can, counter, 0.05)
Step 4: place(green_can -> counter)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the counter
  contact: surface_contact(green_can, counter) [completion]; released(green_can) [completion]
  pose: stable(green_can) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(green_can, counter) AND released(green_can)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the open front of the drawer
the body of the green can
an empty area on the counter
an empty area on the counter
